name: GRAN TIERRA ENERGY INC.
description: Gran Tierra Energy Inc., together with its subsidiaries, is involved in the exploration and production of oil and gas properties in Colombia, Canada, and Ecuador. The company has a strategic partnership with Ecopetrol S.A. for the development of fields in the Middle Magdalena Valley. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Calgary, Canada.
